summary: Pin the 40GB LTX transformer resident across stage-1->stage-2 (kill per-stage re-fault). Root-caused in pod-perf-investigation.md, never shipped. Live 2026-07-04 cu130 4090 bf16 numbers: t2v 93s inter-stage gap; preview->continue ~60s to START stage-2 then ~5s real inference (~92% re-fault). aimdo evicts the 40GB between ComfyUI subgraphs. bf16 & GGUF pay it identically (not a MPI-190 issue). Fix #2 (keep-resident) untested. Node 58 NOT the cause (keep it). USER-only live ops.

HOT LEAD added: app LOCAL engine = torch 2.12.0+cu130 / cuDNN 9.2 / driver 595.97 / 4060 Ti sm_89 -> warm 129s, stage1->stage2 gap <30s. POD = torch 2.10.0+cu130 / driver 580 / 4090 sm_89 -> gap 60-93s. SAME arch (Ada sm_89), BOTH cu130 (MPI-187 lever held constant) — so torch-minor (2.12 vs 2.10) and/or driver (595 vs 580) is a NEW untested axis that HALVES the inter-stage gap locally. MPI-187 never A/Bd two cu130 builds. Cheapest testable lever = bump Pod torch 2.10->2.12+cu130 (one Dockerfile line + rebuild), re-measure gap, target local <30s. Test BEFORE the deeper Fix #2 aimdo keep-resident work. Verify aimdo 0.4.10/node compat survives the bump (research-first).

POD DOCKERFILE EDITED (mpi-ci/cubric-vision-pod/Dockerfile, uncommitted): torch trio bumped 2.10.0/0.25.0/2.10.0 -> 2.12.0+cu130 / torchvision 0.27.0+cu130 / torchaudio 2.11.0+cu130 (matches app local engine exactly). Kept --index-url whl/cu130 load-bearing + the +cu130 assert. Added MPI-191 rationale + a REVERT-to-2.10 escape hatch in the comment (the 2.10 trio is the MPI-187/189 proven cold stack; roll back if 2.12 breaks aimdo or doesnt shrink the gap). aimdo 0.4.10 gate is torch>=2.8 so 2.12 passes on paper. REMAINING (USER, fresh session): build+push the 2.12 image via build-pod-image, live-deploy, watch boot for comfy-aimdo inited + DynamicVRAM enabled (NOT legacy ModelPatcher), run a full multi-stage gen, measure the stage1->stage2 gap vs the 60-93s baseline (target local <30s). If no help or aimdo breaks -> revert the trio. This is lever (a); deeper Fix #2 keep-resident is next if the bump alone falls short.

note: lever (a) torch 2.10->2.12+cu130 already coded+committed in mpi-ci edc09a8; remaining work = build+live-test (user-gated)

summary: OFFLINE 3-agent wrapper audit DONE. Prompt JSON CLEARED (API-format template + field injections, no graph delta). Preview/taesd thread CLOSED (LTXAV taesd_decoder=None -> flag is a no-op everywhere; node 366 = cheap latent2rgb, fires both paths). Wrapper suspects ranked: (1) /wrapper/stats nvidia-smi = BLOCKING subprocess.run in the event loop every 2s during gen (wrapper.py:639) + NVML/driver contention during UVM fault storm; (2) ComfyUI stdout PIPED into wrapper, drained in same loop (wrapper.py:445-475) -> backpressure can stall ComfyUI prints; (3) WS pump WAN forwarding; (4) 5s /history poll. NEW CONFOUND (user recall): first stock test ran GGUF Q8 (~23GB, FITS 32GB 5090 -> no eviction) vs our bf16 40GB -> stock-vs-app numbers not weights-identical. DECISIVE TEST = MPI-192: CUBRIC_COMFY_LISTEN=0.0.0.0 + expose 8188, queue direct-web-UI vs through-app on OUR image/weights. Wrapper fixes ship via R2 runtime (publish-runtime.sh), NO rebuild. Doc updated (pod-perf-investigation.md MPI-191 banner).

Change set SHIPPED offline: wrapper 0.2.24 (stats readers via asyncio.to_thread — kills the event-loop block from nvidia-smi during the app 2s poll; stdout single-decode; version bump both sides), app CUBRIC_NO_POD_STATS=1 stats-poll kill switch, app CUBRIC_EXPOSE_COMFY=1 (MPI-192). Wrapper tests pass (manifest stamp + models upload, both import wrapper.py), py_compile + node --check clean. Deploy: publish-runtime.sh stable (NO image rebuild). Live A/B order documented in pod-perf-investigation.md banner. USER live ops next.

WRAPPER ACQUITTED live (5090/32GB/190GB-RAM, v0.12.0, bf16): browser-direct 81s/~35s-gap == through-app ~83s/~39s. Tax is INSIDE the pod. NEW PRIME SUSPECT: duplicate+stale volume node packs (VHS/KJNodes/MpiNodes/LTXVideo doubled; volume overrides baked — ComfyUI dup-VHS dialog fired on first web-UI load). Bisect running: 4 dup volume dirs moved aside + restart-comfy + re-gen.

STALE/DUP VOLUME PACKS ACQUITTED live: 4 dup dirs moved aside + restart-comfy -> cold 280s (unchanged), WARM GAP 38s (unchanged vs 35-39s). All axes now cleared EXCEPT ComfyUI 0.27-vs-0.26.2 core (async weight offloading + comfy-kitchen + pin pool are 0.27-era). Same-pod git checkout v0.26.2 bisect dispatched (in-place, /opt/ComfyUI shallow clone + pip -r + restart).

SOLVED LIVE: the stage-gap = NETWORK VOLUME read bandwidth. dd on /workspace/mpi_models = 750MB/s; cp transformer to container disk + restart -> warm gap 36s->9s, cold 280s->128s (matches stock). ComfyUI 0.26.2 rollback had already acquitted the version (36s). All axes eliminated in one same-pod session via the MPI-192 door. FIX to implement: stage hot weights to container disk at boot on volume pods (start.sh + maybe disk-size bump; ephemeral pods already disk-rooted). Doc banner rewritten.

Mechanism REFINED by user counter-evidence (stock test had models on a volume too, still fast): re-fault reads fastest tier holding the bytes = page cache -> disk -> volume. Stock = just-downloaded files + 386GB RAM = pure cache (51GB@750MB/s=68s > its whole 59.79s gen — volume reads were impossible). Product pods = stale install + aimdo pins ~90% of 190GB = falls to volume. Disk staging = deterministic tier-2; MPI-160 RAM floor = probabilistic tier-1 alternative for the fix design. Doc banner updated. Pod deleted by user.
validation.md written (root cause live-proven, all acquittals, fix delegated to MPI-194); maturity -> validating. Close-out decision left to user: done-as-root-caused vs hold until MPI-194 ships.

★ ROOT PROBLEM SOLVED LIVE via MPI-194 hot-store. The volume-read-bandwidth diagnosis is CONFIRMED by the fix working: staging the 42GB LTX transformer volume->container-disk collapsed the warm stage-gap ~36s->~9s and full warm ~81s->46s on a real 5090 volume pod. MPI-191 investigation complete; the fix ships as MPI-194 (wrapper hot-store) + MPI-193 (node dedupe fallout). Ready to close once MPI-194 publish+warm-toast verify lands.

doing -> DONE. Root cause (network-volume read bandwidth) SOLVED + the fix SHIPPED as MPI-194 hot-store, live-proven on a 5090 volume pod (~36s->~9s warm gap). Investigation complete. Residual long-video super-linear gap is aimdo memory-thrash, a separate axis -> MPI-197. Fallout MPI-193 (node dedupe) shipped. Accepted.
